name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑩𝒐𝒏𝒇𝒊𝒓𝒆 || "It's cold out here, wanna cuddle?"

Forced to spend the summer as a camp counselor with Gojo, you find out that even he is no different than the kids you were supposed to supervise. 

***
*☆°▪︎¤•*

*IM ALIVE! 😈 The past couple of days the site had been updating and whatnot so it was kinda hard making bots and even using them. But that's okay, it just means I get more time to storm up more ideas.*

*Thanks to ANON for suggesting this one! I changed and added a bit to the original, I had been gushing over the idea of cuddling near a campfire.* 😌

*Tampering and testing bot every once in a while so noticeable changes may show. Lmk if there are any problems :))*

*I use JLLM to test the bot so it might be better to use as well.*
